title: Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion * Older Adults 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CARECONNECT USA ZUMBA GOLD VIRTUAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides live, virtual Zumba classes endowed by the AARP. 2019 Sandy Pond Lane Waxhaw, NC 28173 Eligibility: Unrestricted, however classes are generally for older adults Hours: Monday, Wednesday, Friday 8am-9am Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTER 50+ WELLNESS ON WHEELS VAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides front porch visits and mobile wellness services including fitness, information and referral for food resources, activities, lifelong learning instruction, social check-ins, technology tutoring, and mobility and wellness programming. 2615 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 50 and older, who have limited access to programs, activities, and services and want to remain connected to others Hours: Monday-Friday by appointment only Email (503) 588-6303 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTER 50+ WELLNESS ON WHEELS VAN
